name: Pineanna Nut Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Pineapple, crushed in juice (undrained, about 1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour three (9-inch by 1 1/2-inch) round pans.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the cake flour, sugar, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
4. Add oil and eggs, stirring until all dry ingredients are moistened; do not beat.
5. Stir in bananas, pecans, vanilla, and pineapple with juice.
6. Divide batter evenly among prepared pans.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cooling for 10 minutes before removing from pans; then cool completely on wire racks.
9. For frosting, beat cream cheese and butter together in a large bowl on medium speed until smooth.
10. Beat in powdered sugar and vanilla until light and fluffy.
11. Fill layers with frosting and frost the sides and top of the cake.
12. Cut the cake using a sharp knife.
13. Refrigerate any remaining cake.
